graph.name: TLFQ Webapp Working Graph
graph.generator: graphify skill fallback: Node extractor because Python graphify runtime is unavailable

nodes.label: Student
nodes.description: student user role in the feedback system.

nodes.label: Hod
nodes.description: hod user role in the feedback system.

nodes.label: Admin
nodes.description: admin user role in the feedback system.

nodes.label: React/Vite Web App
nodes.description: Single-page React application with role-based routes.

nodes.label: React Router Route Tree
nodes.description: Routes public auth pages and protected student/HOD/admin sections.

nodes.label: AuthProvider / useAuth
nodes.description: Loads Supabase session, fetches profile, exposes login/register/logout helpers.

nodes.label: AuthGuard
nodes.description: Redirects unauthenticated users to login and mismatched roles to their dashboard.

nodes.label: AppLayout + Sidebar + Topbar
nodes.description: Shared protected application shell with side navigation and role-aware topbar.

nodes.label: Supabase Browser Client
nodes.description: Frontend Supabase anon client used by auth and page-level queries.

nodes.label: Axios API Client
nodes.description: HTTP client for /api with access-token attachment and 401 redirect handling.

nodes.label: Express API Server
nodes.description: Express service mounting auth, forms, reviews, analytics, and admin API routes.

nodes.label: Supabase Service-Role Client
nodes.description: Backend Supabase client using service role credentials to bypass RLS.

nodes.label: Supabase Auth
nodes.description: Email/password auth and session state for all roles.

nodes.label: Supabase Postgres Database
nodes.description: Relational storage for profiles, courses, trainers, forms, reviews, and answers.

nodes.label: LoginPage
nodes.description: Public login page that calls AuthProvider login or skipLogin.

nodes.label: RegisterPage
nodes.description: Public registration page that creates a student account and profile.

nodes.label: Authentication and Role Redirect Flow
nodes.description: Users log in or register; AuthProvider loads session/profile; RootRedirect/AuthGuard sends them to the role dashboard.

nodes.label: Student Feedback Submission Flow
nodes.description: Student sees active course forms, opens one, submits text feedback and ratings to reviews/review_answers, then reviews history/progress.

nodes.label: HOD Form Publishing and Monitoring Flow
nodes.description: HOD manages forms for courses/trainers, closes forms, and reads review answer aggregates for analytics.

nodes.label: Admin Master Data and Oversight Flow
nodes.description: Admin manages users, courses, trainers, forms, leaderboard, and global metrics across the same Supabase tables.

nodes.label: Optional Express API Flow
nodes.description: Express exposes /api routes over the same Supabase data model; frontend currently uses direct Supabase heavily, while api.js is ready for backend calls.
